Video.summary: The Beach Boy arrives in LA and begins to kill drug dealers. Hunter and McCall must figure out his next move.
Video.title: The Beach Boy

Video.summary: Tony must protect an aggressive defense lawyer whose methods he doesn't like.
Video.title: The Trial

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall must work individually after they are separated as partners by their new precinct leader.
Video.title: Change Partners And Dance

Video.summary: Paulie fights to prove that a homeless teenager isn't a murderer.
Video.title: The Kid

Video.summary: A con artist offers to help Tony solve the theft of some gold coins.
Video.title: Cry Wolfe

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall attempt to break a cocaine syndicate apparently being run by one of Hunter's ex-partners.
Video.title: The Castro Connection

Video.summary: A police detective aids in solving a series of murders connected to the estate of a deceased millionaire.
Video.title: From San Francisco With Love

Video.summary: Tony and Paulie reopen the murder investigation of an old friend and partner in New York City.
Video.title: Brooklyn

Video.summary: While trying to help an elderly woman recover her lost life savings, Tony learns Rachel may have cancer.
Video.title: Letting Go

Video.summary: Tony teams with a tough female NYPD detective to catch a serial killer.
Video.title: Off Broadway, Part 1

Video.summary: Hunter receives a death threat from a quick-tempered foreign official determined to avenge his brother's death
Video.title: High Noon In L.A.

Video.summary: While investigating a homicide, McCall falls in love with the prime suspect - the victim's husband.
Video.title: Crime Of Passion

Video.summary: Hunter attempts to apprehend a vicious robbery suspect while he clashes with a vindictive reporter.
Video.title: Overnight Sensation

Video.summary: Reno tackles a new profession while trying to flush out the killer of 3 "Repo Men".
Video.title: Repo Raines

Video.summary: Reno attempts to capture a murderer while meeting with a local Real Estate dealer, which results in the real estate dealer's death during a gunfire exchange.
Video.title: Ace In The Hole

Video.summary: Reno finds himself in a precarious situation when he becomes the latest target of a bounty hunter known as a "living legend" as well as Bobby's teacher and mentor.
Video.title: Living Legend

Video.summary: Reno finds his patience tested while attempting to protect a wealthy socialite and murder witness.
Video.title: Family Ties

Video.summary: Reno gets a new view of "the road" when a country singer solicits his help after a series of mysterious incidents lead the Renegade to suspect that her life is in danger.
Video.title: Broken On The Wheel Of Love

Image.alt: Broken On The Wheel Of Love
Broken On The Wheel Of Love
Broken On The Wheel Of Love

Video.summary: Reno is late and Cheyenne is seriously injured while trying to apprehend weapons dealer.
Video.title: Split Decision

Video.summary: Reno is offered a tempting but dangerous option when he finds himself being "recruited" by a dying hit man.
Video.title: Hitman

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby get more than they gambled for when they head to Las Vegas in pursuit of an escaped bank robber suffering from multiple personalities.
Video.title: Cop For A Day

Video.summary: Bobby gets a new lesson in fear when he heads up to Santa Barbara State College after a serial killer responsible for the disappearance of 5 coeds.
Video.title: Stalker's Moon
